string.text:
The RAPTR is a magazine-fed automatic shotgun born in the Zone and built with the dangers of this world in mind. Stalkers often call it the "Bloodsucker Killer." Indeed, its high rate of fire, large magazine, and excellent ergonomics make it ideal for engaging fast-moving and invisible threats like Bloodsuckers. In recent years, the RAPTR was seen as a trendy weapon for rookies, but with the recent resurgence of Bloodsucker nests, its popularity among seasoned stalkers is on the rise. It's now considered one of the best 12x70 shotguns in the Zone.
 %c[ui_gray_2]ATTACHMENTS:
 %c[d_purple] - %c[ui_gray_2]Leupold M40, Eotech XPS3, Aimpoint CompM4s, Aimpoint Pro, Firefield MG Kemper XL
 %c[d_purple] - %c[ui_gray_2]Hexagon 12K suppressor
Large magazine holding 20 rounds of 12-gauge ammo.

The RAPTR is a magazine-fed automatic shotgun born in the Zone and built with the dangers of this world in mind. Stalkers often call it the "Bloodsucker Killer." Indeed, its high rate of fire, large magazine, and excellent ergonomics make it ideal for engaging fast-moving and invisible threats like Bloodsuckers. In recent years, the RAPTR was seen as a trendy weapon for rookies, but with the recent resurgence of Bloodsucker nests, its popularity among seasoned stalkers is on the rise. It's now considered one of the best 12x70 shotguns in the Zone.
 Modified "custom" version.
 %c[ui_gray_2]ATTACHMENTS:
 %c[d_purple] - %c[ui_gray_2]Leupold M40, Eotech XPS3, Aimpoint CompM4s, Aimpoint Pro, Firefield MG Kemper XL
 %c[d_purple] - %c[ui_gray_2]Hexagon 12K suppressor

The RAPTR is a magazine-fed automatic shotgun born in the Zone and built with the dangers of this world in mind. Stalkers often call it the "Bloodsucker Killer." Indeed, its high rate of fire, large magazine, and excellent ergonomics make it ideal for engaging fast-moving and invisible threats like Bloodsuckers. In recent years, the RAPTR was seen as a trendy weapon for rookies, but with the recent resurgence of Bloodsucker nests, its popularity among seasoned stalkers is on the rise. It's now considered one of the best 12x70 shotguns in the Zone.
 Upgraded "Nimble" version.
 %c[ui_gray_2]ATTACHMENTS:
 %c[d_purple] - %c[ui_gray_2]Leupold M40, Eotech XPS3, Aimpoint CompM4s, Aimpoint Pro, Firefield MG Kemper XL
 %c[d_purple] - %c[ui_gray_2]Hexagon 12K suppressor
